name: Minimal Store
aiPrompt: Generate a clean premium ecommerce homepage using strong product benefits, concise copy, and minimal visual clutter.

catalogModel.productCardStyle: clean cards with large image, product name, short benefit, price, quick add
catalogModel.collectionLayout: 3-column category grid followed by 4-column product grid
catalogModel.productDetailModel: image gallery left, product information right, sticky add-to-cart

visualDifference: Large whitespace, minimal product cards, calm premium shopping experience.

clientSelectionCard.title: Minimal Store
clientSelectionCard.difference: Large whitespace, minimal product cards, calm premium shopping experience.

pages.name: Catalog
pages.layout: 3-column category grid followed by 4-column product grid

pages.name: Detail
pages.purpose: Product, service, offer, menu item, or project detail
pages.layout: image gallery left, product information right, sticky add-to-cart

name: Bold Fashion Store
aiPrompt: Create an energetic fashion ecommerce page with short punchy copy, strong collection language, and bold visual hierarchy.

catalogModel.productCardStyle: large lifestyle image cards with hover reveal, size swatches, sale badges
catalogModel.collectionLayout: collection drops, lookbook banners, outfit sections, new arrivals carousel
catalogModel.productDetailModel: fashion PDP with model photos, size selector, fit notes, complete-the-look products
catalogModel.upsellModel: complete the outfit and similar styles

visualDifference: Feels like a fashion brand, not a normal product grid. Uses collections, model images, drops, and lookbook.

clientSelectionCard.title: Bold Fashion Store
clientSelectionCard.difference: Feels like a fashion brand, not a normal product grid. Uses collections, model images, drops, and lookbook.

pages.name: Catalog
pages.layout: collection drops, lookbook banners, outfit sections, new arrivals carousel

pages.name: Detail
pages.purpose: Product, service, offer, menu item, or project detail
pages.layout: fashion PDP with model photos, size selector, fit notes, complete-the-look products
pages.upsell: complete the outfit and similar styles

name: Marketplace Style
aiPrompt: Build a multi-category ecommerce homepage focused on fast product discovery, deals, search, and trust.

catalogModel.productCardStyle: compact cards with rating, discount, delivery badge, quick view, compare
catalogModel.collectionLayout: search-first layout, category sidebar, deal rows, best seller sections
catalogModel.productDetailModel: marketplace PDP with specs, reviews, Q&A, shipping estimate, recommended bundles
catalogModel.upsellModel: frequently bought together and recently viewed
catalogModel.customerFeeling: Amazon-style discovery, many products, practical and fast

visualDifference: Dense catalog with search bar, side filters, deals, ratings, and comparison feeling.

clientSelectionCard.title: Marketplace Style
clientSelectionCard.difference: Dense catalog with search bar, side filters, deals, ratings, and comparison feeling.

pages.name: Catalog
pages.purpose: Amazon-style discovery, many products, practical and fast
pages.layout: search-first layout, category sidebar, deal rows, best seller sections

pages.name: Detail
pages.purpose: Product, service, offer, menu item, or project detail
pages.layout: marketplace PDP with specs, reviews, Q&A, shipping estimate, recommended bundles
pages.upsell: frequently bought together and recently viewed

catalogModel.upsellModel: curated pairings and private collection recommendations

visualDifference: Not a normal shop grid. Feels like a luxury showroom with storytelling and premium imagery.

name: Digital Products Store

catalogModel.upsellModel: bundle upgrade, membership access, related templates

visualDifference: Catalog sells outcomes, previews, modules, and bundles instead of simple physical products.

clientSelectionCard.difference: Catalog sells outcomes, previews, modules, and bundles instead of simple physical products.
